title: adonis apennina subsp. sibirica
intro: Adonis apennina subsp. sibirica, also known as the Sibirian Adonis or Spring Adonis, is a perennial plant belonging to the Papaveraceae family, characterized by its yellow flowers and toxic properties. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. Consuming this plant is reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory issues, but excessive consumption can be toxic. Herbal preparations of Adonis apennina subsp. sibirica are typically used in small doses and under the guidance of a healthcare professional due to its potential toxicity, often in the form of tinctures, infusions, or topical creams.
